visual: Steps backward repeatedly while one hand retracts past the ear and pushes forward as the other withdraws to the hip, body rotating with each step.
motion_description: The torso rotates roughly 90 degrees sideways, sweeping one hand backward at shoulder height. The front foot steps backward, shifting the body's weight smoothly to the rear leg. Simultaneously, the torso squares forward as the rear hand pushes straight out at chest level and the front hand retracts to the hip. This continuous cycle of horizontal torso rotation, stepping backward, and reciprocating arm extensions repeats at a slow, steady tempo.
